title: David Bowie Quote
excerpt: This post was supposed to go up on Monday, but my laptop would not turn on while at CHA - sorry for the delay! If it's any consolation, I posted it on Instagram and I also got the scripting on…
body:
This post was supposed to go up on Monday, but my laptop would not turn on while at CHA - sorry for the delay! If it's any consolation, I posted it on Instagram and I also got the scripting on video while I was in my booth. So a CHA wrap up to come soon! Back in the studio and I am going to try my best to get back to some regular blogging at some point. There's a lot of stuff in the works that I am excited to share. 

I'm using this watercolor set from Michaels and I have finally tried a waterbrush and found one that I love by Tim Holtz/Ranger. If you have a favorite quote – silly, snarky or simple in its’ wisdom, please share in the comments!

Note: Creativation (formerly CHA)
